/usr/bin/em++ -g -fno-exceptions -Os -stdlib=libc++ -static-libc++ -s WASM=1 -s ENVIRONMENT=web -s IMPORTED_MEMORY=0 -s ALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -s ALLOW_TABLE_GROWTH=1 -s AUTO_JS_LIBRARIES=0 -s STANDALONE_WASM=0 --no-entry @CMakeFiles/cowel-lsp.dir/objects1.rsp -o cowel-lsp.wasm @CMakeFiles/cowel-lsp.dir/linkLibs.rsp
